history.description: v1.1.0 - Added Settings Import/Export (Backup & Restore) and fixed UI bugs
v1.1.1 - Added Update History (Changelog) and Controlled Release control
Fix stock fetching bug and use direct Bin query
Frontend performance optimization for low-end PCs (removed backdrop-filter and blur effects)
UI refinement for user profile block in sidebar
v1.2.0 - Implemented Manual Discount feature with manager authorization and premium UI
v1.2.1 - Responsive UI overhaul (modals/keypads), Offline Thai Fonts support, and Premium Appearance settings

description: v1.2.1: Full Responsive UI overhaul, Offline Thai Fonts, and Premium Appearance settings
